mapper.select: SELECT user_id, nickname, avatar_url, bio_zh, bio_ja, bio_en, location, website, email_public, github_url, twitter_url, linkedin_url, zhihu_url, qiita_url, juejin_url, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM t_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT ui.user_id, ui.nickname, ui.avatar_url, ui.bio_zh, ui.bio_ja, ui.bio_en, ui.location, ui.website, ui.email_public, ui.github_url, ui.twitter_url, ui.linkedin_url, ui.zhihu_url, ui.qiita_url, ui.juejin_url, ui.created_at, ui.created_by, ui.updated_at, ui.updated_by, ui.deleted, ui.deleted_at, ui.deleted_by FROM t_user_info ui JOIN t_article a ON a.author_id = ui.user_id AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 2 AND a.publish_at <= #{now} WHERE ui.deleted = 0 GROUP BY ui.user_id, ui.nickname, ui.avatar_url, ui.bio_zh, ui.bio_ja, ui.bio_en, ui.location, ui.website, ui.email_public, ui.github_url, ui.twitter_url, ui.linkedin_url, ui.zhihu_url, ui.qiita_url, ui.juejin_url, ui.created_at, ui.created_by, ui.updated_at, ui.updated_by, ui.deleted, ui.deleted_at, ui.deleted_by ORDER BY COUNT(a.id) DESC, MAX(a.publish_at) DESC, ui.user_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT user_id, nickname, avatar_url, bio_zh, bio_ja, bio_en, location, website, email_public, github_url, twitter_url, linkedin_url, zhihu_url, qiita_url, juejin_url, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM t_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_info SET nickname = #{profile.nickname}, avatar_url = #{profile.avatarUrl}, bio_zh = #{profile.bioZh}, bio_ja = #{profile.bioJa}, bio_en = #{profile.bioEn}, location = #{profile.location}, website = #{profile.website}, email_public = #{profile.emailPublic}, github_url = #{profile.githubUrl}, twitter_url = #{profile.twitterUrl}, linkedin_url = #{profile.linkedinUrl}, zhihu_url = #{profile.zhihuUrl}, qiita_url = #{profile.qiitaUrl}, juejin_url = #{profile.juejinUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE user_id = #{profile.userId} AND deleted = 0
